title: Bottle Openers
label: Bottle opener
section_copy: Functional Prague-theme bottle openers that give stores a practical souvenir line with stronger everyday-use value and easy trial-order potential.
page_intro: Bottle openers are useful when a store wants souvenir products with a practical angle. Good for tourist counters, beer-focused gift corners, and low-risk assortment testing.
default_note: Suitable for souvenir shops, museum shops, visitor stores, and low-MOQ product testing.
